# SpeakIQ
> AI language learning and conversation practice. Speak a new language confidently in 60 days.

## What this site does
SpeakIQ is an AI language tutor that helps you reach conversational fluency through real AI conversation practice. The AI adapts to your level, corrects grammar in real-time, saves vocabulary as flashcards automatically, and tracks your progress across sessions. Supports 50+ languages.

## Who it's for
Language learners at any level — complete beginners to advanced speakers wanting to maintain fluency. Great for people preparing for travel, work, exams (IELTS, DELF, JLPT), or learning for personal interest.

## Key features
- AI conversation practice in 50+ languages
- Real-time grammar correction and feedback
- Vocabulary flashcards auto-saved from conversations
- Adaptive difficulty — adjusts to your level
- Daily streaks and progress tracking
- Lesson paths: travel, business, exam prep, casual conversation

## Pricing
Free tier available — 20 AI messages per day, no account required. Pro plan from $9.99/month for unlimited messages and advanced features.

## Contact
https://speakiq.app
